title: DTOs Are Boundary Schemas

checks.description: boundary schema pattern and vocab validation are production-covered
checks.command: rta check --pattern-specs --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --pattern-contracts --root fixtures/golden/pass && rta check --production --root fixtures/golden/pass

decision: DTOs are boundary schemas, not domain objects. Edge DTOs must be validated before promotion and mapped into domain commands, queries, events, or value objects before domain logic uses them.
